title: Everbuild – EuroScrim – Self-Adhesive Scrim Tape – High-Tack Adhesive – Off White – 100mm x 90m
features: HIGH QUALITY – This premium self-adhesive scrim tape is quick and easy to apply, eliminating the need for pre-plastering.
PROFESSIONAL FINISH – Strong fibreglass-reinforced plasterers tape backed with a pressure-sensitive adhesive that resists blistering and bubbling for a professional-looking finish.
VERSATILE – Can be used for jointing drywall, and repairing and jointing large cracks in plaster walls and ceilings.
DIFFERENT SIZES – Everbuild EuroScrim is available in widths of 48mm and 100mm.
EASY TO USE – Simply place tape into position and apply directly to the joint or crack, pressing down firmly to ensure good adhesion.
